step.title: Insertion
step.text: Cadet, this is your first Shadow Recruit field operation. Move quietly, keep your suit low, and read the room before you cross open ground. Good luck, cadet.

assetAudit.label: Shadow Operative
notes: Hash-matched against the local Shadow Circuit seed asset during the v0.13.4 provenance audit.
Shadow Operative uses separate idle and run GLBs with runtime clip mapping through AnimationMixer.
Required playable character model; QA must fail missing or unreadable runtime geometry.
Loaded through the runtime GLTFLoader asset path.

assetQuality.label: Floor mesh
notes: Floor mesh covers the authored level bounds with a generated tactical floor-panel image texture.
Floor uses src/assets/generated/tactical-floor-panel.png as a repeated runtime texture.

assetQuality.label: Wall meshes
notes: 12 wall meshes are present and use src/assets/generated/blacksite-wall-panel.png as the repeated generated wall texture.

assetQuality.label: Sliding door panels
notes: 3 sliding door assemblies are present and use the generated door-panel texture.

assetQuality.label: Door-wall seams
notes: 3 sliding-door openings have door frames plus wall/portal continuity meshes behind the door layer, so the door panels visually take priority without reading as missing wall gaps.

assetQuality.label: Tactical set dressing
notes: 16 coordinate-authored non-colliding dressing placements have loaded GLB assets, visible runtime bounds, floor contact, and coordinate footprint coverage without blocking the validation route.

assetQuality.label: Recover the lobby keycard
notes: keycard GLB is visible, grounded, and available for interaction.

notes: terminal GLB is visible, grounded, and available for interaction.
